name: Americans for Prosperity v. Rodriquez
question: Does the policy of the California attorney general’s office requiring charities to disclose the names and addresses of their major donors violate the First Amendment of the U.S. Constitution?
description: A case in which the Court will decide whether a policy of the California attorney general’s office requiring charities to disclose the names and addresses of their major donors violates the First Amendment of the U.S. Constitution.
